company.name: Fang Jiang
company.description: Fang Jiang is a professional stainless steel tableware manufacturer based in China, owning a 5,000 square meter factory. We specialize in producing high-quality stainless steel drinkware, cutlery, lunch boxes, and cookware with competitive pricing and exceptional service.
